sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n103596" key="tetra/xutros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τετρά-χυτρος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype></foreign>, <sense id="n103596.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">made of four pots</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τρυφάλεια</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1220.tlg001:255" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Batr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">255</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
